title: Samnt
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image=[[File:Samnt.jpg]] |name=Samnt |homeworld=[[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Blue |skin=Light |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|What do YOU want?''"
"''Now, Samnt, don't be so rude. If it wasn't for this young Jedi, we wouldn't have met.|Samnt and Elise Montagne, upon seeing Revan|}} '''Samnt''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Homeworld/Legends|living]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] during [[3956 BBY]]. While visiting the world's [[Jedi Enclave]] in that year, he ran into the grieving woman [[Elise Montagne]], who he began talking with. The two had been unintentionally brought together by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and they eventually lived happily ever after with each other. ==Biography== {{Quote|Fortunately, in my grief I returned here and ran into Samnt - an absolutely fascinating man!|Elise Montagne to Revan|}} The [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|man]] Samnt was a [[Homeworld/Legends|settler]] on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]] in [[3956 BBY]]. {{GameLSmechanics}} In that [[Standard year/Legends|year]],''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the events of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', which includes Samnt's appearance, in [[3956 BBY]]. another Human settler named [[Elise Montagne]] had her [[C8-42-GE3|companion droid]] destroyed by the amnesiac former [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]. After the droid's destruction, Montagne ran into Samnt at the planet's [[Jedi Enclave]] and began talking with him. The two found that they held much in common and stayed together with each other in a suite in the enclave. When Revan came across the pair, Samnt rudely asked the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] what he''[[The Old Republic: Revan]] wanted, causing Montagne to apologize for him. The Padawan and the woman then talked independently of Samnt. The man helped Montagne through her grief of her deceased [[Elise Montagne's husband|husband]] and the pair eventually lived happily ever after. {{Endgame}} ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Samnt and I got to talking and, well, we have a lot in common. I think we'll be seeing more of each other. It's funny how these things work out in the end. Maybe there is such a thing as fate, after all...|Elise Montagne to Revan|}} Samnt was considered fascinating by Montagne and she thought they would be seeing more of each other; both appeared very interested. He helped her through her grief and lived happily with the woman. When Revan came across them, Samnt possessed a rude demeanor, and Montagne had to apologize for his action. The man had [[Color/Legends|blue]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], black [[Hair/Legends|hair]], and light skin. ==Equipment== While with Montagne in the Jedi Enclave, Samnt wore green [[Clothing/Legends|robes]] over a light blue shirt and brown pants. The outfit was accompanied with a brown [[Belt/Legends|belt]], brown [[Boot/Legends|boots]], and gray [[Glove/Legends|gloves]]. ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|Not half the man I am!''"
"''Well, if his ego is similarly halved he should be just about right.|Revan and Bastila Shan, commenting on Samnt in an optional dialogue choice|}} Samnt first appeared in the [[2003]] [[BioWare]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''. Samnt will only appear, as part of an optional side guest, if the player destroys C8-42 and tells Elise Montagne of his fate. Upon finding Samnt and Montagne together, the player can give their opinion on the man, two options being calling him nice or not impressive. If the player chooses a female character to play as, they can comment that he is "meh," and that they have seen better. If the player is male, they can say that Samnt is not half the man they are. If companion [[Bastila Shan]] is in the party when this happens, she will comment that if Samnt's ego is similary halved, he could be right. No dialogue option affects the player's alignment. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Samnt |fi=Samnt |pl=Samnt }} [[Category:Dantooinians]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]]
